title: Lab 29: Firewalld Rich Rule
description: Use a persistent rich rule to restrict access to a custom port by source network.

tasks.title: Configure a persistent firewalld rich rule that
tasks.prompt: Configure a persistent firewalld rich rule that allows TCP port 2222 only from the source network 192.168.122.0/24.
solution_commands: firewall-cmd --permanent --add-rich-rule='rule family="ipv4" source address="192.168.122.0/24" port protocol="tcp" port="2222" accept'

tasks.title: Reload firewalld and verify that the rule is active
tasks.prompt: Reload firewalld and verify that the rule is active.

hints: List the effective rich rules after reloading.

checks.original_command: firewall-cmd --list-rich-rules | grep -Fq 'source address="192.168.122.0/24"' && firewall-cmd --list-rich-rules | grep -Fq 'port port="2222" protocol="tcp" accept'
checks.command: firewall-cmd --list-rich-rules | grep -Fq 'source address="192.168.122.0/24"' && firewall-cmd --list-rich-rules | grep -Fq 'port port="2222" protocol="tcp" accept'
